functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Check the 4KB granularity. // ASSERT(((configParams->startAddr & 0xFFFU) == 0U) && ((configParams->endAddr & 0xFFFU) == 0xFFFU)); // // Configure the start and end addresses of the MPU region. // HWREG(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_START((uint32_t)region)) = configParams->startAddr; HWREG(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_END((uint32_t)region)) = configParams->endAddr; // // Configure the type of accesses allowed in the MPU region. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_ACCESS((uint32_t)region)) = (uint8_t)configParams->accessPermission; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the MPU function enable bit. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUCTRL) |= SYNCBRIDGEMPU_MPUCTRL_MPUEN; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the MPU function enable bit. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUCTRL) &= (uint8_t)(~SYNCBRIDGEMPU_MPUCTRL_MPUEN); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Lock the MPU configuration. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUCFG_LOCK) = SYNCBRIDGEMPU_MPUCFG_LOCK_LOCK; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Unlock the MPU configuration. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUCFG_LOCK) = 0U; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Commit the lock on the MPU configuration. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUCFG_COMMIT) = SYNCBRIDGEMPU_MPUCFG_COMMIT_COMMIT; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); uint8_t i; for (i = 0U; i < (uint8_t)SYNCBRIDGEMPU_TOTAL_MPU; i++) { // // Lock the MPU region configuration. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_LOCK(i)) = 1U; } }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); uint8_t i; for (i = 0U; i < (uint8_t)SYNCBRIDGEMPU_TOTAL_MPU; i++) { // // Unlock the MPU region configuration. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_LOCK(i)) = 0U; } }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); uint8_t i; for (i = 0U; i < (uint8_t)SYNCBRIDGEMPU_TOTAL_MPU; i++) { // // Commit the lock on the MPU region registers. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_COMMIT(i)) = 1U; } }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Lock the MPU region registers. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_LOCK((uint32_t)region)) = 1U; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Unlock the MPU region registers. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_LOCK((uint32_t)region)) = 0U; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SYNCBRIDGEMPU_isBaseValid(base)); // // Commit the lock on MPU region registers. // HWREGB(base + SYNCBRIDGEMPU_O_MPUR_COMMIT((uint32_t)region)) = 1U; }
